findings.what_exists: Grievance filing and admin review endpoint
findings.what_it_does: Allows users to file grievances about AURA scores and provides an admin interface for reviewing and resolving these grievances
findings.quality_assessment: Code is well-structured and follows best practices, but some error handling could be improved

summary: The grievance endpoint is well-implemented and compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7, but may benefit from additional error handling and logging
